ogTitle: Maryborough West vs Maryvale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maryborough West and Maryvale.
heading: Maryborough West vs Maryvale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maryborough West, Queensland and Maryvale, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maryborough West has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Maryvale (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maryborough West or Maryvale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maryborough West has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Maryvale scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maryborough West scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Maryvale scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maryborough West or Maryvale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maryborough West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
